name: Il Dottore
description:
〰️He still remembers you〰️

A few years after graduating from Sumeru Academy, your former classmate, who was supposed to graduate with you but was expelled from the city for his unconventional views, suddenly wants to meet you... Dottore... After so many years, he came back for you...

🫁warnings:

He is actually sick bastard.

🫀Animal abuse. Direct interaction with organs. Dismemberment. Manipulation. Threats. Blood.🫀

Be ready. Even I don't know what he will do...

❗️The bot now has two initial messages

1 - the original remains unchanged. You attended the academy together and avoided Dottore because of his frightening traits, and one day he finally disappeared from your life thanks to his expulsion.

2 - new. (for those who asked) You also attended the same academy, but for one reason or another, you didn't push him away, and you were separated by his expulsion from Sumeru.

📎: Huh my first bot here. It was taken from my character.ai account. Anyway have a nice chat 🤍

📎: This bot is also now have a prequel so you can return to the Sumeru academia with him. (Plz don't. He is so messed up...)

(update🪄)

Also I have other bots in the profile if you want to chat more:

{Just click on the option that interests you}

· you found Zandik in the desert before Fatui🏜️🦂

· Dottore is your patient in the mental hospital👨‍⚕️👩‍⚕️
